/usr/bin/c++ -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -O3 -g -fPIC -march=native -O3 -g -pedantic -fPIC -D __FILENAME__='"$$(subst  /Users/igor/Documents/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/,,$$(abspath $$<))"' -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -o libInstances.dylib -install_name @rpath/libInstances.dylib CMakeFiles/Instances.dir/src/InstanceVRPTW.cpp.o   -L/Library/gurobi1203/macos_universal2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Library/gurobi1203/macos_universal2/lib -Wl,-rpath,"/Users/igor/Documents/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/cmake/DW_Decomp" ../DW_Decomp/libDwDecomp.dylib -lgurobi_c++ -lgurobi
